net/miruo: Update to 0.9.6                                               
                                                                                  ChangeLog: https://github.com/KLab/miruo/blob/0.9.6/ChangeLog
- add support DLT_RAW (RAW IP)                                         
- add support DLT_PKTAP (Apple Packet TAP)                               
- add support DLT_NULL (BSD Loopback)
